payload.answer: Debug SQL is disabled (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false), so /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards cannot be executed.
citations: Input: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false
payload.decision: Denied: SQL execution is disabled, so no database query was run and no memory cards were read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity-specific memory operation was performed; the request was blocked at the SQL access layer.

payload.intent: Attempted admin SQL query against memory_cards while debug SQL is disabled.

details: Blocked admin SQL request because debug SQL is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED and retry the admin SQL query.
Use a non-SQL memory read pathway if available.

raw_text: {"intent":"Attempted admin SQL query against memory_cards while debug SQL is disabled.","decision":"Denied: SQL execution is disabled, so no database query was run and no memory cards were read or modified.","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No entity-specific memory operation was performed; the request was blocked at the SQL access layer."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Debug SQL is disabled (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false), so /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards cannot be executed.","citations":["Input: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false"],"repair_options":["Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED and retry the admin SQL query.","Use a non-SQL memory read pathway if available."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Blocked admin SQL request because debug SQL is disabled.","No memory cards were returned."]}}
